body.title: Env-coverage audit — UU_HOME_DB_URL delivery to DB-connecting processes (pre-rotation)
body.finding: The composed UU_HOME_DB_URL reaches ONLY interactive login shells (.bashrc -> uu_bash_profile.sh -> processor). Every non-interactive DB-connecting process relies on the hardcoded code fallback. Removing fallbacks (the sweep) would break them.

process_inventory.process: interactive shell (CC via terminal, manual runs)
ground_loop.service (systemd --user) + supervised web server / plugin-host devices
process_inventory.env_source: unit Environment= sets UU_ROOT + IGOR_HOME ONLY; children inherit that
process_inventory.status: GAP — no UU_HOME_DB_URL; relies on fallback. systemd cannot source the bash profile.

process_inventory.process: crontab jobs (8: learning_pipeline, feed_reading, graph_cache_refresh, claude_bridge, console rotate, review_audit, nudge, reading_poc)
process_inventory.status: GAP — fallback; SEVERAL also on retired ~/TheIgors + lab/claudecode + /tmp paths

process_inventory.env_source: inherited from the invoking shell only (now source .venv, NOT the profile)
process_inventory.status: PARTIAL — gap if launched non-interactively/at boot

process_inventory.process: code reading IGOR_HOME_DB_URL (25 refs: intent, classifier, hubert, build_digester, igor/paths.py, librarian, migrations, ...)
process_inventory.env_source: processor sets UU_HOME_DB_URL only — nothing exports IGOR_HOME_DB_URL
filesystem memory store (devlab/runtime/memory/) — no DB post-consolidation

body.root_mechanism_gap: systemd --user units need a KEY=VAL EnvironmentFile=, and crons have no .bashrc — neither can `source` the bash profile. There is no generated env file today (the processor has only a vault shell_env.cache extension point that no-ops).
body.recommended_mechanism: Have the processor (or a vault refresh step) emit a bare KEY=VAL env file at ~/.unseen_university/uu.env; point ground_loop.service EnvironmentFile= at it and have DB-connecting crons source it. Single generated artifact, systemd-native.
body.gate_correction: Audit's own gate was inverted (gated on the sweep). Corrected: audit ungated (run first); T-uu-sweep-db-connection-string + T-uu-rotate-db-password now gate on T-uu-env-file-for-noninteractive — fallbacks/password must not change until non-interactive processes receive the env.
body.conclusion: NON-ZERO processes rely on the fallback. The sweep/rotation are UNSAFE until the env-file mechanism ships. That mechanism is the lever this audit surfaced.
